name: GOLFTEC Schaumburg
address: 1326 N Roselle Rd Suite B, Schaumburg, IL 60195
about: GOLFTEC is a high-tech golf training and club fitting facility that utilizes advanced motion measurement technology, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-driven instruction. The centers offer personalized golf lessons, practice sessions with coach-designed training plans, and expert club fitting services. GOLFTEC's approach is built around technology-driven feedback and personalized game plans, catering to golfers seeking to improve through structured coaching and analytics.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors for detailed swing analysis
Data-driven coaching with personalized game plans for structured improvement
Integrated club fitting service providing 21 more yards off the tee on average

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors used for club and ball data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, but you can also bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink services are mentioned, so it's unclear if outside food and drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes isn't specified, but practice sessions and lessons are structured around individual skill development and improvement goals.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is suitable for young golfers looking to improve their game with technology-driven coaching.
